sections.biography-source-undefined: Li Ding was from Zhuo, either from the county or commandery. He remarked of the family of Liu Bei, “This family will certainly produce a noble person.” Indeed, Liu Bei would make a name for himself.

full_text:
Li Ding 李定
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Ding (李定)was born in Zhuo. Predicted that Liu Bei would become famous.

Short Biography
Predicted that Liu Bei would become famous.

Literary Appearances
Sanguozhi: Shu 2
BiographySource Undefined
Li Ding was from Zhuo, either from the county or commandery. He remarked of the family of Liu Bei, “This family will certainly produce a noble person.” Indeed, Liu Bei would make a name for himself.
